category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a scalable static site server for Git forges; official docs describe git-pages as a static website server updated by HTTP request and git/forge workflows.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-pages; official documentation header uses git-pages static site server.
docs_sources: Official git-pages documentation site links to the Codeberg project and contains introduction, running a server, publishing, and theory pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Codeberg source-control project URL; official docs link back to codeberg.org/git-pages.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Git forges and static site serving; official docs describe git push/webhook publishing, Forgejo workflows, S3 storage, and server operation.
